homepage.title: Cabot Corporation | Specialty Chemicals and Performance Materials
homepage.description: Cabot Corporation (NYSE: CBT) is a leading global specialty chemicals and performance materials company that has delivered innovative performance solutions to customers for over 140 years. We are a leading provider of reinforcing carbons, battery materials, engineered elastomer composites, specialty carbons, fumed metal oxides, masterbatches and conductive compounds, inkjet colorants and aerogel.
homepage.text_excerpt:
Cabot Corporation | Specialty Chemicals and Performance Materials
Acquisition of Mexico Carbon Manufacturing S.A. de C.V.
We are proud to announce the acquisition of Mexico Carbon Manufacturing S.A. de C.V. (MXCB) from Bridgestone Corporation, reinforcing our position as a leading provider of reinforcing carbons.
Learn More
2025 Sustainability Report
We are pleased to publish our 2025 Sustainability Report, highlighting the progress made in 2024 toward advancing our sustainability performance and achieving key objectives.
Learn More
2030 Sustainability Goals
We are proud to unveil our new 2030 Sustainability Goals, which target six priority topics and reflect our ambition to drive measurable impact.
Learn More
Platinum Rating from EcoVadis
We have achieved a platinum rating from EcoVadis, the highest recognition available, for the fifth consecutive year. Placing us among the top 1% of companies assessed by EcoVadis globally, this prestigious recognition highlights our efforts to drive meaningful environmental and social progress as well as our ongoing commitment to advancing transparency across our value chain.
Learn More
As a leading global specialty chemicals and performance materials company, we are committed to advancing our customers’ businesses in the transportation,infrastructure, environment and consumer industries.
About Cabot
As a leading global specialty chemicals and performance materials company, we are committed to advancing our customers’ businesses in the transportation,infrastructure, environment and consumer industries.
Learn More
Learn how our products are used and discover the many benefits they enable in three unique settings: Cabot City, Cabot Country and Cabot at Sea.
Explore the Cabot World
Learn how our products are used and discover the many benefits they enable in three unique settings: Cabot City, Cabot Country and Cabot at Sea.
Learn More
To further our commitment to sustainability, we announced our ambition to achieve net zero emissions by 2050 consistent with the Paris Climate Agreement.
Our Net zero ambition
To further our commitment to sustainability, we announced our ambition to achieve net zero emissions by 2050 consistent with the Paris Climate Agreement.
The Latest At Cabot

2030 SUSTAINABILITY GOALS
By working together and making a commitment to leadership in sustainability, we know that we will continue to deliver solutions that make a difference today and well into the future.

products.text:
Products and Applications | Cabot Corporation
Our solutions can improve product performance, streamline manufacturing processes and inspire innovation.
Solutions /
Applications
Applications
Products
Product Index
Adhesives & Sealants
Our fumed silicas and specialty carbons provide reinforcement, conductivity and rheological properties to a variety of aqueous and solvent-based adhesives formulations.​
Batteries
We create materials that improve battery life, performance and safety through technology innovation and customer-oriented solutions.
Consumer Rubber Products
We offer a broad product portfolio of fumed silicas and carbon blacks for a variety of consumer rubber applications.
Coatings
We provide innovative specialty carbon and fumed silica additives that can improve the color, processing, applicability, strength and safety of your coating system.​
Construction
Manufacturers of top-tier building composites leverage our additives to deliver the highest level of performance.
Digitalization
Our additives can enable innovative developments for electrification and digitalization applications.
Digital Printing
Aqueous pigment dispersions are used across a wide range of inkjet printing applications.
Fiber
Our products offer exceptional color and cleanliness for fiber and textile applications.​ ​
Food & Beverage
Our products deliver functionality that ranges from how end products taste and smell to how they pour and are stored.
Industrial Rubber Products
Our solutions enable performance requirements ranging from high durability to fluid resistance, conductivity, resistivity and more.
Oil, Gas & Mining
We deliver solutions for rubber mining applications, subsea pipeline and industrial insulation, and more.
Pharmaceuticals & Personal Care
Our innovative products and additives offer solutions for applications ranging from medicinal tablets to skin and beauty care.
Plastics
We supply specialty carbons, masterbatches and conductive compounds that can deliver a range of performance attributes.
Printing & Packaging
Our high quality pigments and additives provide superb product performance in printing and packaging applications.
Tires
We offer a comprehensive suite of products specifically engineered for tire manufacturers that deliver performance and sustainability benefits.
Aerogel
High-quality silica aerogel enables best-in-class solutions for thermal management for EV batteries, insulating plasters and consumer products.
Battery Materials
We are the only global player with a comprehensive product portfolio of additive materials for battery applications, including conductive additives, fumed metal oxides for cathode, separator and electrolyte stability, and aerogel for cell barriers to mitigate thermal runaway.
Carbon Blacks for Elastomer Reinforcement
We are the global leader in reinforcing agents for high performance tires and specialized industrial rubber products.
Engineered Elastomer Composites
Our pre-mixed composite solutions help you unlock superio
